title: cyclorhiza puana
intro: Cyclorhiza puana, also known as the "Tiger's Milk Mushroom", is a type of fungus that belongs to the Boletaceae family. It is prized for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant compounds, which have been shown to have antibacterial and antifungal effects. The health benefits of Cyclorhiza puana include its ability to boost the immune system, reduce oxidative stress, and exhibit potential anti-cancer properties. In traditional medicine, it is often prepared as a tea or tincture, and may also be used in combination with other herbs to enhance its effects.
